forgotPassword.title: Forgot your password?
forgotPassword.description: Enter your email address and we'll send you a link to reset your password.
forgotPassword.successMessage: If that email is registered, a reset link has been sent.

resetPassword.title: Reset your password
resetPassword.successMessage: Your password has been reset. You can now log in.
resetPassword.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least 8 characters.
resetPassword.invalidOrExpired: This reset link is invalid or has expired.
